hero.title: Move Freely. Explore Athens.
hero.subtitle: Rent wheelchairs, scooters, and mobility aids delivered to your hotel. Explore the Acropolis, stroll through Plaka, and enjoy Athens without barriers.

howItWorksSection.title: How It Works
howItWorksSection.step1Desc: Browse our range of wheelchairs, scooters, and rollators. Filter by your needs.
howItWorksSection.step2Desc: Pick your dates, enter your hotel details, and pay securely online.
howItWorksSection.step3Desc: Equipment arrives at your accommodation, sanitized and ready. Free pickup when you're done.

whySection.title: Why Moveability?
whySection.athensBasedDesc: We're local. We know every ramp, every route, every accessible gem in Athens.
whySection.qualityGuaranteedDesc: Every item is inspected, sanitized, and maintained to the highest standards.
whySection.hotelDeliveryDesc: Free delivery and pickup within Athens city center. Zone-based pricing for suburbs and airport.
whySection.supportDesc: Reach us anytime via WhatsApp, phone, or email. We speak English and Greek.

accessibleAthensSection.title: Discover Accessible Athens
accessibleAthensSection.subtitle: Practical guides to help you explore Athens with confidence
accessibleAthensSection.acropolisExcerpt: Discover the accessible routes, lifts, and facilities available at the Acropolis archaeological site.
accessibleAthensSection.restaurantsExcerpt: A curated list of wheelchair-friendly restaurants in Athens' historic Plaka neighborhood.
accessibleAthensSection.airportTitle: Getting from Athens Airport with Mobility Equipment
accessibleAthensSection.airportExcerpt: Your complete guide to accessible transport options from Athens International Airport.

ctaBanner.title: Not sure what you need?
ctaBanner.subtitle: Our team is here to help. Tell us about your trip and we'll recommend the right equipment.

equipmentListing.title: Mobility Equipment for Rent
equipmentListing.subtitle: Quality wheelchairs, scooters, and mobility aids delivered to your door in Athens
equipmentListing.noEquipment: No equipment found in this category.
equipmentListing.needHelpDesc: Our team can recommend the right equipment based on your needs, accommodation, and itinerary.

howItWorksPage.title: How Moveability Works
howItWorksPage.subtitle: Renting mobility equipment in Athens is simple. Here's how it works in 5 easy steps.
howItWorksPage.step1Desc: Explore our range of wheelchairs, scooters, and rollators. Filter by type, compare specifications, and find the perfect fit for your needs.
howItWorksPage.step2Desc: Choose your rental start and end dates. Need it for 1 day, a week, or a month? We have flexible tiered pricing for every duration.
howItWorksPage.step3Desc: Enter your hotel details, select your delivery zone, and pay securely via Stripe. You'll receive an instant confirmation email.
howItWorksPage.step4Desc: Our team delivers your sanitized equipment directly to your hotel, airport, or cruise port. We'll meet you at reception and show you how everything works.
howItWorksPage.step5Desc: Explore the Acropolis, dine in Plaka, stroll along the coast. When your rental ends, we pick up the equipment from your accommodation. That's it.
howItWorksPage.pricingSubtitle: Prices are per rental period — the longer you rent, the lower your daily cost.
howItWorksPage.pricingNote: All prices include sanitization and safety checks. Delivery fees vary by zone. See full pricing on the
howItWorksPage.deliveryNote: Store pickup is free at any of our 4 Koinis locations. Pickup is always included at no extra charge for all zones.
howItWorksPage.faq1q: Do I need to leave a deposit?
howItWorksPage.faq1a: Yes — a small refundable deposit is required at the time of booking. It is returned in full once the equipment is picked up in good condition.
howItWorksPage.faq2q: Can I extend my rental period?
howItWorksPage.faq2a: Absolutely. Contact us at least 24 hours before your rental ends and we'll extend it — subject to availability.
howItWorksPage.faq3a: Every item is professionally sanitized and safety-checked between rentals. We follow strict hygiene protocols.
howItWorksPage.faq4q: What if the equipment breaks during my rental?
howItWorksPage.faq4a: All equipment is covered by our rental insurance. Contact us immediately and we'll arrange a replacement at no extra cost.
